titles.title: Nutrition Education and Chronic Disease Prevention in Community Health Centers Act of 2026
Nutrition Education and Chronic Disease Prevention in Community Health Centers Act of 2026
To amend the Public Health Service Act to authorize funding for nutrition education and chronic disease prevention at federally qualified health centers, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
Subcommittee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Forwarded by Subcommittee to Full Committee by Voice Vote.
